scripts.build: yarn workspace api build && yarn workspace bot build && yarn workspace dashboard build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n chroma,api,bot,dashboard -c yellow,blue,green,magenta "yarn dev:chroma" "yarn dev:api" "yarn dev:bot" "yarn dev:dashboard"
scripts.lint: yarn workspace api lint && yarn workspace bot lint && yarn workspace dashboard lint
scripts.test: yarn workspace api test && yarn workspace bot test && yarn workspace dashboard test
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace api typecheck && yarn workspace bot typecheck && yarn workspace dashboard typecheck
